rationale: double-precision ptr read (rare but hot when used)
N-value f32 buffer alloc for BLAS/FFI calls
tensor creation — frequent in graph construction
expose raw float* to BLAS kernels

text: Any HEXA-ification proposal that touches a T3 entry requires benchmark PR showing training step ≤ 5% diff on train_alm_14b_micro.hexa (1-epoch mini).
self/native/tensor_kernels.c — included from self/runtime.c at end. Standalone compile unit planned for T3 Phase 2 (-flto + BLAS direct link).
PRs modifying self/native/tensor_kernels.c require anima maintainer review (tag @anima-core).
